name: Advance America
description_short: One of the largest US payday lenders, offering same-day payday loans, installment loans, title loans, and lines of credit across 27+ states.
description_long:
Advance America was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Spartanburg, South Carolina. The company operates as a wholly owned subsidiary of Grupo Elektra, a large Mexican financial and retail conglomerate. With 800 to 1,500+ retail storefronts across approximately 27 to 28 states — plus online lending in those same markets — it ranks among the largest payday lenders in the United States by physical footprint. Advance America holds an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau and earned BBB accreditation in September 2024. It is also a founding member of the Community Financial Services Association of America (CFSA), an industry self-regulation body that requires member lenders to offer extended repayment plans to borrowers who cannot repay on the original due date.

The company's core product is the payday loan: short-term advances of $100 to $2,000 with repayment terms of 7 to 30 days, typically priced around $15 per $100 borrowed. In addition to payday loans, Advance America offers installment loans with multi-month repayment schedules in select states, auto title loans secured by vehicle equity, revolving lines of credit up to approximately $4,000 in select states, in-store check cashing, and cash advances both online and at retail locations. APRs range from 143.29% to 688.28% depending on state, loan type, and term — payday loan APRs typically fall in the 350–700% range, while installment products in rate-capped states come in lower. All lending is subject to state licensing and regulation, which varies significantly; some states prohibit payday lending altogether.

What sets Advance America apart within the payday lending industry is scale and accessibility. In-store applicants can receive cash in approximately 30 minutes; online applicants typically receive approval decisions in 2 to 4 hours with next-business-day or same-day funding. The company also runs a customer rewards program that lets borrowers accumulate points for on-time payments, redeemable for fee discounts on future loans — an unusual feature in this industry segment. CFSA membership obligates the company to offer extended payment plans, providing a safety valve for borrowers who cannot repay on schedule. Financial education content is also available on their website.

Advance America is a legitimate, licensed, and well-established lender — but it is not a low-cost option. APRs reaching nearly 700% represent one of the most expensive forms of legal credit available to US consumers, and the short repayment windows on payday loans create real risk of repeat borrowing cycles. The company is best suited for borrowers who face a genuine, time-sensitive cash shortfall, have no access to lower-cost alternatives, and can realistically repay the full loan on their next payday. Consumers who anticipate needing more time to repay should explore installment loan options or the CFSA extended payment plan rather than rolling over a payday loan.

pricing.guarantee_details: Not applicable — Advance America is a lender, not a subscription service. No money-back guarantee exists for loan products.

tiers.name: Payday Loan
features: Available in-store and online across 27+ states

tiers.name: Installment Loan
features: Lower APRs than payday loans in rate-capped states
Fixed payment amounts over loan term

tiers.name: Title Loan
features: Larger loan amounts possible based on vehicle value
Vehicle must be owned outright or have significant equity

tiers.name: Line of Credit
features: Draw funds as needed up to credit limit

certifications: State lending licenses in all operating states

pros: One of the largest US payday lenders with 800–1,500+ retail locations across 27+ states
In-store cash disbursement in approximately 30 minutes; online approvals in 2–4 hours
Customer rewards program earns points for on-time payments, redeemable for fee discounts on future loans
CFSA founding member — contractually obligated to offer extended repayment plans to borrowers who cannot repay on time
BBB A+ rating and accredited since September 2024
Multiple loan products available: payday, installment, title loans, and lines of credit depending on state
Financial education content available on website alongside loan products
cons: APRs range from 143.29% to 688.28% — among the highest legal borrowing costs available to US consumers
Short 7-to-30-day repayment windows on payday loans create significant risk of repeat borrowing cycles and debt traps
Not available in all states — payday lending is prohibited or severely restricted in numerous US states
Owned by Grupo Elektra, a Mexican conglomerate — not a US-rooted independent company
Native mobile app unconfirmed — only a mobile-accessible web portal has been verified
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who cannot access traditional bank loans or credit cards
Borrowers facing a genuine short-term cash emergency who need funds within 24 hours
People who have been denied for personal loans due to poor or thin credit history
Consumers in one of the 27+ states where Advance America is licensed and operating
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for consumers facing a documented short-term cash emergency — specifically those who have exhausted lower-cost options and can realistically repay the full loan amount on their next payday. The central caveat is cost: APRs can reach nearly 700%, meaning these loans become extremely expensive if not repaid on schedule, and repeat borrowing is a well-documented risk for financially vulnerable consumers.
services: Installment loans with multi-month repayment (select states)
Auto title loans (secured by vehicle equity, select states)
Lines of credit up to approximately $4,000 (select states)
Online account management portal (apply, check status, make payments)
Customer rewards program (points for on-time payments)
Extended repayment plans (CFSA requirement for members)
Financial education resources on company website

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
